user_query: What were the other options for father day 1 breakfast before we deleted them?

selected_nodes.name: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal
selected_nodes.short_description: Warm oatmeal topped with dried figs, walnuts, honey, and a swirl of tahini — a Mediterranean twist on a classic breakfast with wholesome flavors.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: Cook oats in milk or water until creamy. Top with sliced dried figs, crushed walnuts, a drizzle of raw honey, and a spoonful of tahini. Finish with a light sprinkle of cinnamon and a few pomegranate seeds if available. Pair with a small glass of fresh orange juice for a complete Mediterranean morning.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Oats provide soluble fiber (beta-glucan) for heart health and steady blood sugar; walnuts are rich in omega-3 ALA and vitamin E; figs supply potassium, calcium, and iron; tahini adds healthy fats, protein, and calcium. Honey adds natural sweetness — use sparingly. A well-rounded Mediterranean breakfast with complex carbs, healthy fats, and fiber.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 1 > Breakfast > Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal
selected_nodes.reasoning: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal was one of the deleted Father > Day 1 > Breakfast options per the version change context; it matches the requested 'other options' that were removed.

selected_nodes.name: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise
selected_nodes.short_description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato-pepper sauce with cumin and paprika, served with crusty bread for dipping — a vibrant, savory Mediterranean breakfast.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: Sauté diced onion, garlic, and bell pepper in olive oil. Add crushed tomatoes, cumin, paprika, and a pinch of chili flakes; simmer 10 minutes. Create wells and crack eggs into the sauce, cover and cook until whites are set. Sprinkle with crumbled feta and fresh parsley. Serve with warm crusty bread or pita for dipping.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; tomatoes are rich in lycopene and vitamin C; bell peppers add additional vitamin C and antioxidants. Cumin and paprika offer anti-inflammatory compounds. Olive oil supplies healthy fats. A moderate-calorie, nutrient-dense breakfast; control sodium through feta portions.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 1 > Breakfast > Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise
